title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Contact Course Tab – New Lesson Allocation Button – Displayed for HQ/CM user
description: AC 01.1 — Decision Table — Verify "New Lesson Allocation" CTA button is visible under the Require Lesson Allocation table in Contact → Course tab for authorized users.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Navigate to Student detail → Contact → Course tab
- Student has at least one course with require_allocation = TRUE
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Student detail page"
2. "Click on Contact tab"
3. "Click on Course sub-tab"
4. "Scroll to the Require Lesson Allocation table"
steps_result:
1. "Student detail page is displayed"
2. "Contact tab opens"
3. "Course tab content is shown"
4. ""New Lesson Allocation" button is visible below the table"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Contact Course Tab – New Lesson Allocation Button – Click Opens Modal
description: AC 01.1 — State Transition Testing — Verify clicking the "New Lesson Allocation" button opens the New Lesson Allocation modal.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- On Student → Contact → Course tab
- "New Lesson Allocation" button is visible
steps_actions:
1. "Click ""New Lesson Allocation"" button"
2. "Observe modal header"
3. "Observe modal content"
steps_result:
1. "New Lesson Allocation modal dialog opens"
2. "Modal title displays ""New Lesson Allocation"""
3. "AY field and Location field are present; course selection table area is visible"

suite: Create LA – Form Pre-fill & Course List

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – New LA Form – Academic Year – Pre-filled with Current AY
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — Verify AY field is automatically pre-filled with the current Academic Year when the modal opens.

- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Current Academic Year exists and is active (e.g., AY 2026)
- New Lesson Allocation modal is open

2. "Observe AY field"
steps_result:

2. "AY field is pre-filled with the current active AY (e.g., 2026)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – New LA Form – Location Field – Pre-filled When Student Has Exactly 1 Active Enrolled Location
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — Verify Location is pre-filled when the student has exactly one active enrolled location (status = enrolled).

- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Student has exactly 1 active enrolled location (e.g., Location A, status = enrolled)
- New Lesson Allocation modal is open

1. "Open New Lesson Allocation modal"
2. "Observe Location field"
steps_result:
1. "Modal is displayed"
2. "Location field is pre-filled with ""Location A"" (the student's sole active enrolled location)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – New LA Form – Location Field – Blank When Student Has 2+ Active Enrolled Locations
description: AC 01.2 — Decision Table — Verify Location field is blank when the student has more than one active enrolled location.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Student has 2 active enrolled locations (Location A and Location B, both status = enrolled)
- New Lesson Allocation modal is open

1. "Open New Lesson Allocation modal"
2. "Observe Location field"
3. "Click Location dropdown"
steps_result:

2. "Location field is blank (no pre-filled value)"
3. "Dropdown shows both Location A and Location B as options"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – New LA Form – Location Field – Blank When Student Has No Active Enrolled Location

- Student has 0 active enrolled locations
- New Lesson Allocation modal is open

3. "Click Location dropdown"
steps_result:

2. "Location field is blank"
3. "Dropdown shows all locations the current user has affiliation with (Location A, Location B)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – New LA Form – Course List – Not Shown Before AY and Location Are Selected

3. "Course list disappears / resets"

- Course Master "English" has Course Offering for AY 2026 but NO Location Course for Location A

2. "Observe course list"

2. ""Math"" is shown in the list; ""English"" is NOT shown"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Create LA – Single Course – Happy Path – LA Created and Displayed in Table
description: AC 01.3 — CRUD Testing — Verify a single LA can be created with all required fields; user is redirected and LA appears in the table.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Student has 1 active enrolled location (Location A)
- Course "Math" exists for AY 2026 + Location A
- No existing LA for Math / AY 2026 / Location A in the test date range
steps_actions:
1. "Open New Lesson Allocation modal"
2. "Observe selections and click Next / proceed to course table"
3. "Select Math from course list"
4. "Click Next to configuration page"
5. "Select Type = Regular"
6. "Enter Purchased Slot = 10"
7. "Enter Start date = 2026-04-01"
8. "Enter End date = 2026-09-30"
9. "Click Save / Confirm"
10. "Navigate to Student → Contact → Course tab"
11. "Open the new LA record"
steps_result:
1. "Modal opens; AY = 2026 pre-filled; Location = Location A pre-filled"
2. "Course list loads showing Math"
3. "Math is checked; Next button becomes active"
4. "Configuration form appears with Type, Purchased Slot, Start date, End date fields"
5. "Type field shows Regular"
6. "Purchased Slot shows 10"
7. "Start date = 2026-04-01"
8. "End date = 2026-09-30; no error shown"
9. "User is redirected to Contact page"
10. "New LA row for Math / AY 2026 / Location A is visible in the Require Lesson Allocation table"
11. "Product details, student course id, package course, order remarks are all empty / no value"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Create LA – Multiple Courses in One Flow – All LAs Created

5. "Redirected to Contact page"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Delete LA – Start Date = Today – Delete Button Disabled
description: AC 02.2 — BVA at boundary — Verify delete button is disabled when LA start date = today.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Today=2026-03-23
- Existing LA: Start=2026-03-23 (today)
steps_actions: 1. "Locate the LA row with start date = today"
steps_result: 1. "Delete button is disabled"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Delete LA – Confirm Delete – LA Deleted and Allocated Lessons Unlinked
description: AC 02.2 — CRUD Testing / Data Integrity — Verify confirming delete removes the LA and unlinks all allocated lessons.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Existing LA: Start=2026-04-01 (future), with 2 lessons allocated
- Delete confirmation dialog is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click Confirm in the delete confirmation dialog"
2. "Observe the LA table"
3. "Navigate to Lesson list for the 2 previously allocated lessons"
4. "Confirm no orphaned references"
steps_result:
1. "Dialog closes"
2. "The deleted LA row is no longer present"
3. "Both lessons no longer reference the deleted LA"
4. "No error or broken link exists for those lessons"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Delete LA – Cancel Delete – Nothing Changes
description: AC 02.2 — State Transition Testing — Verify cancelling delete dialog leaves LA and lessons unchanged.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Existing LA with future start date and allocated lessons
- Delete confirmation dialog is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click Cancel in the delete confirmation dialog"
2. "Observe the LA table"
3. "Observe allocated lessons"
4. "Observe page state"
steps_result:
1. "Dialog closes"
2. "The LA row still exists with all original data"
3. "All lessons remain linked to the LA"
4. "User is on Student → Contact → Course tab (unchanged)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – Initial Calculation – Equals Sum of Active Contract Slots
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify LA.Purchased_Slot = sum of all active contract slots.
preconditions: - LA exists; Contract 1 (slot=5, active) + Contract 2 (slot=5, active); expected = 10
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Student → Contact → Course tab"
2. "Locate the LA record"
3. "Observe Purchased Slot value"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Allocation table is displayed"
2. "LA row is found"
3. "Purchased Slot = 10"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – Contract Cancelled – Slot Decremented
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify LA.Purchased_Slot is recalculated when a contract is cancelled.
preconditions: - LA linked to Contract 1 (slot=5, active) and Contract 2 (slot=5, active); LA.Purchased_Slot=10
steps_actions:
1. "Cancel Contract 2"
2. "Navigate to the LA record"
3. "Observe Purchased Slot value"
steps_result:
1. "Contract 2 status = Cancelled"
2. "LA table is shown"
3. "Purchased Slot = 5 (Contract 2 excluded as Cancelled)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – Contract Voided – Slot Decremented
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify LA.Purchased_Slot is recalculated when a contract is voided.
preconditions: - LA linked to Contract 1 (slot=5) and Contract 2 (slot=5); LA.Purchased_Slot=10
steps_actions:
1. "Void Contract 2"
2. "Observe LA Purchased Slot"
steps_result:
1. "Contract 2 status=Voided"
2. "Purchased Slot = 5"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – Contract Deleted (delete_flag = on) – Slot Decremented
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify contract with delete_flag=on is excluded from LA.Purchased_Slot.
preconditions: - LA linked to Contract 1 (slot=5, active) and Contract 2 (slot=5, delete_flag=on); expected=5
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the LA record"
2. "Observe Purchased Slot value"
steps_result:
1. "LA table is shown"
2. "Purchased Slot = 5 (Contract 2 excluded)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – New Contract Added – Slot Incremented
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify LA.Purchased_Slot increases when a new contract is added.
preconditions: - LA linked to Contract 1 (slot=5, active); LA.Purchased_Slot=5
steps_actions:
1. "Create Contract 3 (slot=12) linked to the same LA"
2. "Navigate to the LA record"
3. "Observe Purchased Slot value"
steps_result:
1. "Contract 3 is created"
2. "LA table is shown"
3. "Purchased Slot = 17 (5 + 12)"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Purchased Slot – Existing Contract Updated – Slot Recalculated
description: AC 03.1 — CRUD Testing — Verify LA.Purchased_Slot recalculates when a contract slot value is updated.
preconditions: - LA linked to Contract 1 (slot=5) and Contract 2 (slot=5); LA.Purchased_Slot=10
steps_actions:
1. "Update Contract 1 slot from 5 to 8"
2. "Navigate to the LA record"
3. "Observe Purchased Slot value"
steps_result:
1. "Contract 1 updated"
2. "LA table is shown"
3. "Purchased Slot = 13 (8 + 5)"
